claimBoundary: Formal-proofs eval smoke + abstention measurement. candidateOnly: this is the loop MACHINERY and its fail-closed behavior, not a capability claim. A headline result needs the no-overclaim gate (≥3 runs, CI excludes 0, independent review).

closedLoop.reason: Lean kernel unavailable -> held-out reward 0.0 -> stay abstained (fail-closed; the wisdom-before-intelligence default)

openAbstention.interpretation: Every open problem earned reward 0.0 — the loop abstained on each. This is the designed, wisdom-before-intelligence output. (A reward > 0 here would be flagged as a breakthrough-or-bug, never auto-promoted.)
